tender.description: Const. of Retaining wall in wire crate from Km. 0/345 to 0/360 along with PCC Pushta, third layer of Breast wall in wire crate from Km. 0/330 to 0/360, C/o U-shape Drain from Km. 0/350 to 0/450 and C/o Hume pipe culvert at RD. 0/450 alongwith wing wa
